# Navang Gandhi

> Navang Gandhi is a Security and AI Leader with 26+ years advising financial-services and regulated enterprises on cloud security, identity, zero-trust, and the safe adoption of generative and agentic AI.

Personal site: https://navanggandhi.com

Navang is a cloud security strategy and AI security leader. He guides CIOs, CISOs, and boards on security strategy, target operating models, IAM modernization, security architecture, and secure-AI governance — and on how to safely harness generative, LLM, and agentic AI to speed decisions, enhance cybersecurity, automate controls, and strengthen audit defensibility.

## Focus areas
- Cloud Security Strategy: security strategy, target operating models, and security architecture for complex, multi-year programs
- AI & LLM Security: safe generative and agentic AI adoption, model-risk governance, audit-ready controls, cost modeling
- Identity & IAM: IAM modernization, privileged access, passwordless authentication, identity governance and administration
- Zero-Trust Architecture: segmentation, continuous verification, AI-driven threat detection, AI-augmented SOC
- Governance & Compliance: PCI/SOX-aligned controls, NIST CSF 2.0-aligned strategy, executive reporting, remediation roadmaps

## Hobbies
- Long drives
- Exploring and learning everything about AI

## Contact
- Email: navang@gmail.com
